title: One Piece
opinion: the goat. no debate. oda is a genius and if you disagree you haven't read water 7
author: Eiichiro Oda

crew.Luffy: Captain, Gomu Gomu/Nika fruit, Gear 5, wants to be Pirate King
crew.Zoro: Swordsman, three-sword style, wants to be world's greatest
crew.Sanji: Cook, Black Leg kicks, Germa enhancements, Ifrit Jambe
crew.Usopp: Sniper, slingshot expert, brave warrior of the sea
crew.Robin: Archaeologist, Flower-Flower fruit, sprouts body parts
crew.Brook: Musician, Revive-Revive fruit skeleton, soul powers

power_system.devil_fruits: Paramecia (body), Zoan (animal), Logia (element). Awakening = advanced mastery.
power_system.haki: Observation (predict/sense), Armament (invisible armor), Conqueror's (dominate will). Advanced CoC coats attacks.
power_system.luffy_powers: Gear 2 (speed), Gear 3 (giant), Gear 4 (bounce/snake/tank), Gear 5 (Nika awakening, cartoon physics)

key_facts: One Piece is the treasure at Laugh Tale left by Gol D. Roger
Will of D. is a mysterious inherited initial
Void Century: 800 years of erased history
Gear 5/Nika reveal is one of the most iconic moments in anime
Running since 1997, considered greatest manga by many
